# Angel Bail Bonds - LLM Information

## Business Overview

**Angel Bail Bonds**
- Owner: Karri McBride
- Location: Stillwater, Oklahoma
- Service Area: Payne, Pawnee, Lincoln, Kay, Noble, Logan, Creek, Garfield, Pottawatomie, Oklahoma, Tulsa, Osage, Washington, Grant, Kingfisher Counties
- Years of Experience: 15+
- Business Type: Women-Owned Bail Bond Services
- Rating: 4.9 Stars (127+ Google Reviews)
- Availability: 24/7 Emergency Services

## Contact Information

- Phone: (405) 614-3000
- Email: bailbondangel@gmail.com
- Address: Stillwater, Oklahoma

## Services Offered

1. **Felony Bail Bonds**
2. **Misdemeanor Bail Bonds**
3. **DUI/DWI Bonds**
4. **Domestic Violence Bonds**
5. **Drug Charges Bonds**
6. **Warrant Bonds**
7. **Traffic Violation Bonds**
8. **Federal Bonds**

## Service Coverage Areas

### Payne County
- Payne County Detention Center: 606 S Husband St, Stillwater, OK 74074
- Phone: (405) 372-4522
- County Seat: Stillwater
- Communities: Stillwater, Cushing, Perkins, Yale, Glencoe, Ripley

### Pawnee County
- Pawnee County Jail: 500 Harrison St, Pawnee, OK 74058
- Phone: (918) 762-2541
- County Seat: Pawnee
- Communities: Pawnee, Cleveland, Ralston, Jennings, Hallett

### Lincoln County
- Lincoln County Jail: 811 Manvel Ave, Chandler, OK 74834
- Phone: (405) 258-1300
- County Seat: Chandler
- Communities: Chandler, Stroud, Prague, Meeker, Davenport, Wellston, Agra, Warwick, Carney, Sparks, Tryon

### Kay County
- Kay County Detention Center: 201 S Main St, Newkirk, OK 74647
- Phone: (580) 362-2517
- County Seat: Newkirk
- Communities: Ponca City, Newkirk, Blackwell, Tonkawa, Braman, Kaw City

### Noble County
- Noble County Jail: 300 Courthouse Dr #14, Perry, OK 73077
- Phone: (580) 336-4281
- County Seat: Perry
- Communities: Perry, Billings, Morrison, Red Rock, Marland, Lucien, Ceres, Sumner

### Logan County
- Logan County Jail: 216 S Broad St, Guthrie, OK 73044
- Phone: (405) 282-4100
- County Seat: Guthrie
- Communities: Guthrie, Crescent, Coyle, Mulhall, Orlando, Marshall, Cedar Valley

### Creek County
- Creek County Justice Center: 9175 Ridgeview St, Sapulpa, OK 74066
- Phone: (918) 227-6371
- County Seat: Sapulpa
- Communities: Sapulpa, Bristow, Drumright, Kellyville, Kiefer, Glenpool, Depew, Mannford, Oilton, Mounds, Slick

### Garfield County
- Garfield County Detention Center: 1020 S 10th St, Enid, OK 73701
- Phone: (580) 548-2429
- Sheriff: (580) 237-0244
- County Seat: Enid
- Courthouse: 114 W Broadway Ave, Enid, OK 73701 · Court Clerk: (580) 237-0232
- Communities: Enid, Covington, Drummond, Lahoma, Waukomis, Hunter, Garber, Kremlin, Carrier, Hillsdale, Fairmont, Douglas, Breckinridge, North Enid

### Pottawatomie County
- Pottawatomie County Jail: 14209 US-177, Shawnee, OK 74804
- Phone: (405) 275-0043 ext 2
- County Seat: Shawnee
- Courthouse: 325 N Broadway Ave, Shawnee, OK 74801
- Population: ~72,000
- Distance from Stillwater: 60 miles
- Communities: Shawnee, Tecumseh, McLoud, Bethel Acres, Earlsboro, Maud, Wanette, Asher, Brooksville, St. Louis, Macomb

### Oklahoma County
- Oklahoma County Detention Center: 201 N Shartel Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73102
- Phone: (405) 713-1930
- County Seat: Oklahoma City (state capital)
- Population: 800,000+
- Distance from Stillwater: 52-65 miles
- Communities: Oklahoma City, Edmond, Midwest City, Del City, The Village, Nicoma Park, Choctaw, Harrah, Luther, Jones, Arcadia, Spencer

### Tulsa County
- David L. Moss Criminal Justice Center: 300 N Denver Ave, Tulsa, OK 74103
- Phone: (918) 596-8900
- County Seat: Tulsa
- Courthouse: 500 S Denver Ave, Tulsa, OK 74103 · Phone: (918) 596-5000
- Population: ~700,617
- Visitation: In-person Friday-Saturday 8AM-3:30PM (immediate relatives); Video daily 8:30AM-4:30PM (onsite, free) and 8:30AM-10PM (offsite, fee)
- Communities: Tulsa, Broken Arrow, Bixby, Jenks, Sand Springs, Owasso, Glenpool, Collinsville, Skiatook, Sperry, Liberty

### Osage County
- Osage County Detention Facility: 900 S St. Paul Ave, Pawhuska, OK 74056
- Phone: (918) 287-4395
- County Seat: Pawhuska
- Population: ~47,469
- Distance from Stillwater: 75 miles (1 hr 16 min)
- Visitation: Monday-Friday 9:00 AM-3:00 PM only; 30-minute max, one visit per 7 days, visitors must be 18+ with photo ID
- Communities: Pawhuska, Fairfax, Hominy, Cleveland, Barnsdall, Skiatook, Wynona, Shidler, Burbank, Foraker, Avant, Bowring, Webb City, Bigheart

### Washington County
- Washington County Correctional Facility: 611 SW Adams Blvd, Bartlesville, OK 74003
- Phone: (918) 332-4011
- County Seat: Bartlesville
- Courthouse: 420 S Johnstone Ave, Bartlesville, OK 74003 · Court Clerk: (918) 337-2870
- Population: ~52,455
- Distance from Stillwater: 95 miles (1 hr 47 min)
- Visitation: Monday-Friday 7:30 AM-9:00 PM, Saturday-Sunday 7:30 AM-2:30 PM
- Communities: Bartlesville, Dewey, Copan, Ramona, Ochelata, Vera

### Grant County
- Medford Jail: 219 N First St, Medford, OK 73759
- County Seat: Medford
- Courthouse: 112 E Guthrie St, Medford · Phone: (580) 395-2274
- Population: ~4,169
- Distance from Stillwater: 61 miles
- Visitation: Monday-Friday 7:30 AM-9:00 PM, Saturday-Sunday 7:30 AM-2:30 PM; 2 visits/week; Video Tuesday-Sunday 8:15 AM-4:00 PM (two 45-min sessions/week)
- Communities: Medford, Pond Creek, Wakita, Deer Creek, Lamont, Manchester, Nash, Jefferson, Renfrow

### Kingfisher County
- Kingfisher County Jail: 119 S Main St, Kingfisher, OK 73750
- Phone: (405) 375-4242
- County Seat: Kingfisher
- Courthouse: 101 S Main St, Kingfisher, OK 73750 · Phone: (405) 375-3887
- Population: ~14,300
- Distance from Stillwater: 63 miles (1 hr 19 min)
- Visitation: Video only (no in-person visits); 4 video visits per week, 24 minutes each; must be on approved list
- Communities: Kingfisher, Hennessey, Okarche, Cashion, Dover, Loyal, Omega

## Pricing & Payment

- Competitive, state-regulated bail bond rates
- Payment Options: Cash, Visa, Mastercard, Zelle, Venmo
- Financing available for qualifying clients
- No hidden fees

## Languages

- English
- Spanish (Se habla español)

## Key Features

- 24/7 availability including holidays
- Fast processing (typical 1-4 hour releases)
- Remote bond posting available by phone
- Women-owned business
- 15+ years of local experience
- Compassionate, confidential service

## Core Values

- Integrity in every transaction
- Compassion for families in crisis
- Professional, dignified service
- Local expertise across Central Oklahoma

## Specialized Services

- Same-day bonds
- Weekend and holiday posting
- Phone consultations
- Remote bond posting for all service counties
- Bilingual support

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: How quickly can Angel Bail Bonds post a bond?**
A: In most cases, we can have someone released within 1-4 hours after bail is set, depending on the facility and time of day.

**Q: What counties does Angel Bail Bonds serve?**
A: We serve 15 counties across Central and North-Central Oklahoma: Payne, Pawnee, Lincoln, Kay, Noble, Logan, Creek, Garfield, Pottawatomie, Oklahoma, Tulsa, Osage, Washington, Grant, and Kingfisher Counties.

**Q: Do you offer payment plans?**
A: Yes, we offer flexible financing options for qualifying clients.

**Q: Can you post bail remotely?**
A: Yes, we can often handle the entire bail bond process over the phone for all counties we serve.
